summary: Good‑sound recording of a solid show that many thought was average, but the reviewer finds it hot
review: The lone review praises the audio as “pretty damn good,” noting clear and enjoyable sound. While some fans considered this night weaker than the Buffalo performance, the reviewer feels the music holds up on its own and calls the set "hot," though no specific songs or moments are highlighted.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review; reviewer likes both the performance and the sound, but provides no detail on standout moments or recording source, so rating is modestly high but confidence is low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the audio as "pretty damn good" and mentions overall good sound quality without noting any flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer simply feels the night holds up well compared to expectations.
